index.html:
CSS Tooltips

Just CSS ::before (bubble) and ::after (arrow). And a sprinkle of JavaScript.

01 — Positions
02 — Variants
03 — Icon buttons
✕ ⚙
04 — Inline text tooltips

Pseudo-elements are ghost elements generated by CSS. They require a content property to render, and each element gets exactly two of them. Together they're enough to build a complete tooltip system with zero extra markup.

::before = bubble  ·  ::after = arrow  ·  no JS, no extra HTML
